seoTitle: Shell Cove vs Shellharbour — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Shell Cove and Shellharbour. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Shell Cove vs Shellharbour: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Shell Cove and Shellharbour.
heading: Shell Cove vs Shellharbour — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Shell Cove, New South Wales and Shellharbour, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Shell Cove has a lower overall climate risk score (39/100) compared to Shellharbour (44/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Shell Cove or Shellharbour safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Shell Cove has a flood risk score of 45/100, while Shellharbour scores 59/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Shell Cove scores 30/100 for bushfire risk. Shellharbour scores 27/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Shell Cove or Shellharbour?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Shell Cove has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.03% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
